comment: This seems to just be giving +2/+2 to every card that is played, rather than just the second played creature

player_cards.name: Blood Dragon
player_cards.rules_text: Ignores Guards and may attack creatures in any lane.

opponent_cards.name: Imprisoned Deathlord
opponent_cards.rules_text: When an enemy creature is summoned, Shackle Imprisoned Deathlord.

player_cards.name: Reachman Shaman
player_cards.rules_text: At the start of your turn, give another random friendly creature +1/+1.

player_cards.name: Fetcherfly Golem
player_cards.rules_text: When Fetcherfly Golem takes damage and survives, summon a 2/2 Fetcherfly Swarm.

player_cards.name: Feasting Vulture
player_cards.rules_text: Summon: +2/+2 if a creature died this turn.

discard.name: Mudcrab Merchant
discard.rules_text: Summon: The Merchant shows you two cards he has for sale. Choose one to put into your hand. He puts the other into your opponent's hand.

hand.name: Mentor of the Watch
hand.rules_text:
Prophecy, Guard
Summon: Give a creature in your hand Guard.

hand.name: Stormcloak Camp
hand.rules_text:
Ongoing
At the end of your turn, if a creature died this turn, deal 2 damage to your opponent.

discard.name: Tribunal Oathman
discard.rules_text: Summon: If you have a Willpower card in play, you gain 4 health. If you have an Endurance card in play, gain +1 max magicka.

hand.name: Snowy Sabre Cat
hand.rules_text: May attack an extra time each turn.

hand.name: Riften Pickpocket
hand.rules_text: Summon: Copy the top card of your opponent's deck into your hand.

local.name: Haunted Manor
local.rules_text:
Ongoing
Give the second creature you summon each turn +2/+2.
